sn35.109:1.1: “Monks, I will teaching you the phenomena that are conducive to fettering and the fetter.
sn35.109:1.2: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.”
sn35.109:1.3: “And which are the phenomena conducive to fettering? And which is the fetter?
sn35.109:1.4: “The eye, monks, is a phenomenon conducive to fettering.
sn35.109:1.5: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there...
sn35.109:1.6: “The tongue is a phenomenon conducive to fettering.
sn35.109:1.7: “The intellect is a phenomenon conducive to fettering.
sn35.109:1.8: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn35.109:1.9: “These are called the phenomena conducive to fettering. This is the fetter.”
